commands.author: moeedahmed
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6e12bbbb0852362ea90c5dc14bf8b8af63beeb42)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Mattermost inbound handling so mention-only posts bypass the empty normalized-body drop, adds helper tests, and adds a standalone proof script.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +12, Other +163. Total +179 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current Mattermost code detects the raw mention, strips it with `normalizeMention`, then drops the post when `bodyText` is empty before dispatch. I did not run a live Mattermost workspace reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real Mattermost proof, and automation should not repair or merge around missing external setup evidence.

target.title: fix(acp): strip chat options for Claude ACP sessions
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve startup ACP runtime options without replaying them as post-start controls
- strip chat-only model/thinking options from managed Claude ACP startup and resume paths
- keep timeout/cwd runtime options intact and add regressions for spawn, initialize, and restart/resume paths

## Tests
- node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.initialize-session.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:core:all

## Real behavior proof

**Setup:** Mac Mini M4 arm64, openclaw v2026.6.x, live gateway with managed Claude ACP (agentId: `claude`).

**Before (pre-fix) — redacted gateway error log from this OpenClaw setup:**

```
2026-06-12T12:24Z [ws] res ✗ errorCode=UNAVAILABLE AcpRuntimeError: Internal error: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=0b4a2d6a…
2026-06-13T08:36Z [ws] res ✗ errorCode=UNAVAILABLE AcpRuntimeError: Internal error: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=39f87d89…
2026-06-13T09:46Z [ws] res ✗ errorCode=UNAVAILABLE AcpRuntimeError: Internal error: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=01728a7d…
2026-06-13T11:01Z [ws] res ✗ errorCode=UNAVAILABLE AcpRuntimeError: Internal error: Invalid value for config option effort: off: code=ACP_TURN_FAILED run=963d5346…
```

Root cause confirmed in same log: managed Claude ACP sessions failed because OpenClaw was replaying chat runtime controls (`thinking/effort=off`) into post-start Claude ACP config options, which Claude rejects.

**After — test run on PR head (cc542548a08a) on the same Mac Mini:**

```
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs \
    src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts \
    src/acp/control-plane/manager.initialize-session.test.ts \
    src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts
 RUN  v4.1.7
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  13 passed (13)
   Duration  327ms

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.acp.config.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed (7)
   Duration  337ms

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  66 passed (66)
   Duration  2.60s

[test] passed 3 Vitest shards in 8.02s
```

Passing tests covering the fixed behavior (verbatim test names):
- `AcpSessionManager initializeSession > strips chat model and thinking options before initializing Claude ACP`
- `AcpSessionManager initializeSession > does not reapply startup runtime options as config controls on first turn`
- `AcpSessionManager initializeSession > applies post-start controls on first turn without resending startup model/thinking`

Runtime: Node v22, vitest v4.1.7, Mac Mini M4 arm64, 2026-06-15.
